user.title: Moj Elektro
user.description: Enter your Moj Elektro API token.

add_usage_point.title: Add usage point
add_usage_point.description: Enter the identifikator (short form, e.g. 4-1234567) or the 18-digit GSRN of the meter.

configure_measurements.title: Configure measurements
configure_measurements.description: For {naziv} ({identifikator}) — pick any combination of Statistics and InfluxDB per reading type. Leaving a row empty skips it.

data.A_PLUS_15MIN: Active energy received, A+ (15 min, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_15MIN: Active energy delivered, A- (15 min, kWh)
data.R_PLUS_15MIN: Reactive energy received, R+ (15 min, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_15MIN: Reactive energy delivered, R- (15 min, kVArh)
data.P_PLUS_15MIN: Active power received, P+ (15 min, kW)
data.P_MINUS_15MIN: Active power delivered, P- (15 min, kW)
data.Q_PLUS_15MIN: Reactive power received, Q+ (15 min, kVAr)
data.Q_MINUS_15MIN: Reactive power delivered, Q- (15 min, kVAr)
data.A_PLUS_T0_DAILY: Active energy state, A+ T0 (daily, kWh)
data.A_PLUS_T1_DAILY: Active energy state, A+ T1 (daily, kWh)
data.A_PLUS_T2_DAILY: Active energy state, A+ T2 (daily, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T0_DAILY: Active energy state, A- T0 (daily, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T1_DAILY: Active energy state, A- T1 (daily, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T2_DAILY: Active energy state, A- T2 (daily, kWh)
data.R_PLUS_T0_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R+ T0 (daily, kVArh)
data.R_PLUS_T1_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R+ T1 (daily, kVArh)
data.R_PLUS_T2_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R+ T2 (daily, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T0_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R- T0 (daily, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T1_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R- T1 (daily, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T2_DAILY: Reactive energy state, R- T2 (daily, kVArh)

create_entry.influxdb_verified: InfluxDB connection verified. Found {count} existing data points.

backfill.title: Backfill from a date
backfill.description: Re-fetches every routed measurement for every usage point from the chosen date up to now. Runs in the background; check the Home Assistant log for progress.

configure_measurements.title: Configure measurements
configure_measurements.description: For {naziv} ({identifikator}) — pick any combination of Statistics and InfluxDB per reading type.

sync_schedule.title: Daily sync schedule
sync_schedule.description: When enabled, readings are fetched once a day at this local time.
